message:
style(harness,runtime): apply rustfmt formatting to rollout_runbook and subscription

Reformat import grouping in rollout_runbook tests and normalize line
wrapping in subscription.rs (has_panicked, catch_unwind closure, and
multi-line assert macros) to satisfy rustfmt conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
